title: Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing
scenario: Parsing configuration values should keep lower-level parse details while returning the loader error type.
instructions: Add InvalidPort(ParseIntError), implement From<ParseIntError>, and use ? in parse_port.

hints.body: Keep the Hierarchical configuration loader errors code active and add InvalidPort(ParseIntError), implement From<ParseIntError>, and use ? in parse_port.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing is shown below.

completionExplanation: Wrap ParseIntError for port parsing now extends the active Hierarchical configuration loader errors code with config err parse wrap. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
